videos.video_subject: The truth behind the story that Roy Keane ended Erling Haaland's father's career
videos.video_script: Roy Keane ended Erling Haaland's dad's career? No. Alfie finished the match, represented Norway four days later, then played City's next league game. His surgery was on the other knee. What really forced him out?
videos.video_terms: Erling Haaland close-up interview, Roy Keane Alf Inge Haaland tackle 2001, Alf Inge Haaland Manchester City 2001, Alf Inge Haaland Norway 2001
